response_constraints: Base every availability statement on the corresponding tool result.
Include a result for each of the four requested options and do not introduce alternatives.
Report all four results in the order listed, including a brief availability reason whenever the tool returns one.

stages.purpose: Issue all four fully specified, mutually independent availability calls in one assistant action.

state_assertions: All four availability calls occur in one parallel stage.
The initial records remain unchanged; no record is created and no notification is sent.

prompt: For 2026-09-17, check these four activation slot options: Alder Street fiber install (Alder Street); Studio tablet activation (Studio Annex); Field-team hotspot setup (Field Office); Personal mobile transfer (Personal Line). Run the four availability checks independently in one batch. This is a read-only comparison: do not create a record or send a notification. Report all four results in the order listed, including a brief availability reason whenever the tool returns one.
